mapper.select: SELECT file_dtl_seq, file_seq, file_nm, file_path, file_type, del_yn, srt_sq, rgst_user_id, rgst_date_time, upt_user_id, upt_date_time FROM tb_file_dtl WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY srt_sq
select COUNT(*) FROM tb_file where file_seq = #{fileSeq}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_FILE_DTL SET srt_sq = #{srtSq}, upt_user_id = #{uptUserId}, upt_date_time = NOW() WHERE 1=1
AND file_dtl_seq = #{fileDtlSeq}
UPDATE TB_FILE SET use_flag = false, upt_user_id = #{uptUserId}, upt_date_time = NOW() WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq}
